title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud announced updates to its agent platform, including a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with an Agent Builder featuring no-code/low-code design. The platform includes a new Agent Registry and marketplace for reusable components, enterprise governance with time-travel debugging, observability, evaluation, and managed simulation capabilities.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech outlines updates to the company's agent platform, centered on a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. The core addition is an Agent Builder with no-code and low-code design, plus an Agent Registry and marketplace for reusable components. For enterprise teams, it adds governance with time-travel debugging, observability, evaluation, and managed simulation. The takeaway is a consolidation of agent orchestration, governance, and testing into a single platform.
